title: tragacantha orthantha
intro: Tragacantha orthantha, also known as the "Horned Vetch" or "Lesser Horned Vetch," is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha orthantha is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional remedies to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
